query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a residential street with a parked SUV on the right shoulder next to a sidewalk and single-story buildings. A tall street lamp stands at the center, illuminating the road and its white lane markings. Horizontal streaks of light from moving vehicles appear along the left side of the asphalt. Palm trees and leafy vegetation line both sides of the street, with concrete boundary walls on the left and utility poles running parallel to the road beneath a dark sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime residential street suffused with a sickly yellow-orange sodium vapor cast, showing a parked SUV on the right shoulder beside buildings and a sidewalk. A street lamp at the center exhibits extreme overexposure and radiant highlight blowout, while intensely bright light trails from passing vehicles streak across the left lane. The white walls, road surface, and vegetation are shifted into jaundiced yellow tones by the pervasive color cast, with deep shadows swallowing detail in the surrounding palms and dark sky.
